features.name: event trigger with source location in co_await
features.description: Code should include a timing control statement using co_await with an event trigger expression that may expose source location information

features.name: delay statement with source location
features.description: Code should include a delay statement (#) that when processed may leak source file and line information in debug output

features.name: co_await delay with source location
features.description: Code should include a timing control using co_await with a delay call that passes source file name and line number

features.name: event expression in string literal for debug
features.description: Code should include an event control expression (@) stored in a string literal that could be exposed via debug messages
